attributes.Sql Query:
SEL DISTINCT  A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,
A.SERVICE_SKU,
A.GOODS_PRODUCT_ID,
CAST(SUM(A.ISO_SKU_PID_NET) OVER (PARTITION BY  A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, A.SERVICE_SKU, A.GOODS_PRODUCT_ID) AS DECIMAL(30,16))/ 
CAST(SUM(A.ISO_SKU_PID_NET) OVER (PARTITION BY  A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, A.SERVICE_SKU) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) AS ISO_SKU_PCT
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_POS_CTRY_SKU_NON_CMS_CUM A, 
(SEL * FROM  $$STGDB.WI_POS_CTRY_SKU_NON_CMS_CUM 
WHERE CUM_PCT <=100.100000 AND CUM_PCT>79.999999
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,SERVICE_SKU ORDER BY  CUM_PCT ASC) = 1
)B WHERE A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=B.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE AND A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID=B.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID AND   A.SERVICE_SKU=B.SERVICE_SKU AND A.CUM_PCT <=B.CUM_PCT

SELECT SERVICE_SKU,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,GOODS_PRODUCT_ID,TOTAL_SKU,SKU_PID_NET,
COALESCE(((WI.SKU_PID_NET/NULLIFZERO(WI.TOTAL_SKU))),0) *100 AS ISO_PCT,
CSUM (ISO_PCT,ISO_PCT DESC) CUM_PCT
FROM (
SELECT DISTINCT SERVICE_SKU,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,GOODS_PRODUCT_ID
,CAST(SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT* ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE) OVER (PARTITION BY  SERVICE_SKU ) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) TOTAL_SKU
,CAST(SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT* ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE) OVER (PARTITION BY  SERVICE_SKU ,GOODS_PRODUCT_ID) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) SKU_PID_NET
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_BOOKINGS_BY_PID  PID1
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY  SALES_HIER
ON  PID1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = SALES_HIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER ENDCUST 
ON ENDCUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY = PID1.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY  
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SVC_FINANCE_HIERARCHY SFH
ON  PID1.SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID=SFH .BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID
WHERE PID1.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH)
AND TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT>0 AND BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('ERP','AR') AND SERVICEORDERNUMBER<> -9999
AND SALES_HIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='WW DISTRIBUTION' AND CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG='N'
AND ENDCUST.GU_PRIMARY_NAME = 'DISTI STOCK' 
AND  BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID ='CLOUD MANAGED SERVICES'
) WI GROUP BY 1,2

SEL DISTINCT  A.SERVICE_SKU,A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,A.GOODS_PRODUCT_ID,
CAST(SUM(A.SKU_PID_NET) OVER (PARTITION BY  A.SERVICE_SKU,A.GOODS_PRODUCT_ID) AS DECIMAL(30,16))/ 
CAST(SUM(A.SKU_PID_NET) OVER (PARTITION BY  A.SERVICE_SKU) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) AS ISO_SKU_PCT
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_POS_SKU_CMS_CUM A, 
(SEL * FROM  $$STGDB.WI_POS_SKU_CMS_CUM 
WHERE CUM_PCT <=100.100000 AND CUM_PCT>79.999999
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY SERVICE_SKU ORDER BY  CUM_PCT ASC) = 1
)B WHERE A.SERVICE_SKU=B.SERVICE_SKU  AND A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID=B.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID  AND  A.CUM_PCT <=B.CUM_PCT

SELECT SERVICE_SKU,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,GOODS_PRODUCT_ID,TOTAL_SKU,SKU_PID_NET,
COALESCE(((WI.SKU_PID_NET/NULLIFZERO(WI.TOTAL_SKU))),0) *100 AS ISO_PCT,
CSUM (ISO_PCT,ISO_PCT DESC) CUM_PCT
FROM (
SELECT DISTINCT SERVICE_SKU,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,GOODS_PRODUCT_ID
,CAST(SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT* ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE) OVER (PARTITION BY  SERVICE_SKU ) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) TOTAL_SKU
,CAST(SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT* ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE) OVER (PARTITION BY  SERVICE_SKU ,GOODS_PRODUCT_ID) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) SKU_PID_NET

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER ENDCUST

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SVC_FINANCE_HIERARCHY SFH
ON  PID1.SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID=SFH .BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID
WHERE PID1.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH)
AND TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT>0 AND BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('ERP','AR') AND SERVICEORDERNUMBER<> -9999
AND SALES_HIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='WW DISTRIBUTION' AND CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG='N'
AND ENDCUST.GU_PRIMARY_NAME = 'DISTI STOCK' 
AND BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID <>'CLOUD MANAGED SERVICES'
) WI GROUP BY 1,2

SEL DISTINCT  A.SERVICE_SKU,A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,A.GOODS_PRODUCT_ID,
CAST(SUM(A.SKU_PID_NET) OVER (PARTITION BY  A.SERVICE_SKU,A.GOODS_PRODUCT_ID) AS DECIMAL(30,16))/ 
CAST(SUM(A.SKU_PID_NET) OVER (PARTITION BY  A.SERVICE_SKU) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) AS ISO_SKU_PCT

QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY SERVICE_SKU ORDER BY  CUM_PCT ASC) = 1

SEL DISTINCT  A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,A.GOODS_PRODUCT_ID,
CAST(SUM(A.ISO_PID_NET) OVER (PARTITION BY  A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,A.GOODS_PRODUCT_ID) AS DECIMAL(30,16))/ 
CAST(SUM(A.ISO_PID_NET) OVER (PARTITION BY  A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) AS ISO_PCT

SELECT ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,SERVICE_SKU,GOODS_PRODUCT_ID,TOTAL_ISO_SKU,ISO_SKU_PID_NET,
COALESCE(((WI.ISO_SKU_PID_NET/NULLIFZERO(WI.TOTAL_ISO_SKU))),0) *100 AS ISO_SKU_PCT,
CSUM (ISO_SKU_PCT,ISO_SKU_PCT DESC) CUM_PCT
FROM (
SELECT DISTINCT ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,SERVICE_SKU,GOODS_PRODUCT_ID
,CAST(SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT* ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE) OVER (PARTITION BY  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,SERVICE_SKU ) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) TOTAL_ISO_SKU
,CAST(SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT* ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE) OVER (PARTITION BY  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,SERVICE_SKU ,GOODS_PRODUCT_ID) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) ISO_SKU_PID_NET
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_BOOKINGS_BY_PID  PID1
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY  SALES_HIER
ON  PID1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = SALES_HIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER ENDCUST 
ON ENDCUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY = PID1.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY  
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SVC_FINANCE_HIERARCHY SFH

AND SALES_HIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='WW DISTRIBUTION' AND CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG='N'
AND ENDCUST.GU_PRIMARY_NAME = 'DISTI STOCK'

SEL DISTINCT  
A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,
A.SERVICE_SKU,
A.GOODS_PRODUCT_ID,
CAST(SUM(A.ISO_SKU_PID_NET) OVER (PARTITION BY  A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, A.SERVICE_SKU,A.GOODS_PRODUCT_ID) AS DECIMAL(30,16))/ 
CAST(SUM(A.ISO_SKU_PID_NET) OVER (PARTITION BY  A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, A.SERVICE_SKU) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) AS ISO_SKU_PCT
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_POS_CTRY_SKU_CMS_CUM A, 
(SEL * FROM  $$STGDB.WI_POS_CTRY_SKU_CMS_CUM 
WHERE CUM_PCT <=100.100000 AND CUM_PCT>79.999999
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,SERVICE_SKU ORDER BY  CUM_PCT ASC) = 1
)B WHERE A.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=B.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE AND A.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID=B.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID AND   A.SERVICE_SKU=B.SERVICE_SKU AND A.CUM_PCT <=B.CUM_PCT

SELECT ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,SERVICE_SKU,GOODS_PRODUCT_ID,TOTAL_ISO_SKU,ISO_SKU_PID_NET,
COALESCE(((WI.ISO_SKU_PID_NET/NULLIFZERO(WI.TOTAL_ISO_SKU))),0) *100 AS ISO_SKU_PCT,
CSUM (ISO_SKU_PCT,ISO_SKU_PCT DESC) CUM_PCT

SELECT DISTINCT ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,SERVICE_SKU,GOODS_PRODUCT_ID
,CAST(SUM(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT* ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE) OVER (PARTITION BY  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,SERVICE_SKU ) AS DECIMAL(30,16)) TOTAL_ISO_SKU

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER ENDCUST

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SVC_FINANCE_HIERARCHY SFH

WHERE PID1.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH)
AND TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT>0 AND BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('ERP','AR') AND SERVICEORDERNUMBER<> -9999
